text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey you two, feel like a little chit-chat?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about this? Palmer here will listen to
aaanything that's bothering you, so hit me like I'm
an older sister!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why would you need to act like that? I've already
got one older sister to deal with.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And I've got someone like an older sister. Turns
out we're talkin' about the same person, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, Hayahide, right? She does give off that
vibe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well that gives me some relief, I guess. You gals
are in some good hands.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian and Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's ri—I mean no it's not! Mind your own
business!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw, looks like you've got lots to say after all!
Let's hear it. ♪
